---
title: "Castro Category Analysis"
author: "Castro Team"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
my_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkred")
  )

theme_set(my_theme)
```

## Read and arrange data

```{r data}
df.all <- read_csv("csv_with_categories.csv") %>% 
  select(-"...1", -"date")

df.castro <- df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>% 
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>% 
  ungroup()

df.mission <- df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "mission") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>% 
  ungroup()

df.marina <- df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "marina") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>% 
  ungroup()
```

## Castro Plots

```{r castro, echo=FALSE}
df.castro %>% ggplot(aes(x = prop,
                         y = fieldsite,
                         fill = category)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, as.character(category), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 3, color = "white") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Castro Responses by Fieldsite",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite",
       subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels")

df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "castro",
         fieldsite %in% c("mission_res", "marina_res")) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(y = fieldsite,
               fill = category),
           position = "fill") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ order) +
  labs(title = "Categorized Castro Responses by Order",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite")

df.castro %>% 
  filter(fieldsite %in% c("castro_res", "castro_vis")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = prop,
             y = fieldsite,
             fill = category)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, as.character(category), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 3, color = "white") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Castro Responses by Castro Respondent Type",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite",
       subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels")
```
## Mission Plots

```{r mission, echo=FALSE}
df.mission %>% ggplot(aes(x = prop,
                         y = fieldsite,
                         fill = category)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, as.character(category), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 3, color = "white") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Mission Responses by Fieldsite",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite",
       subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels")

df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "mission",
         fieldsite == "mission_res") %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(y = fieldsite,
               fill = category),
           position = "fill") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ order) +
  labs(title = "Categorized Mission Responses by Order",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite")
```

## Marina Plots

```{r marina, echo=FALSE}
df.marina %>% ggplot(aes(x = prop,
                         y = fieldsite,
                         fill = category)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, as.character(category), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 3, color = "white") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Marina Responses by Fieldsite",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite",
       subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels")

df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "marina",
         fieldsite == "marina_res") %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(y = fieldsite,
               fill = category),
           position = "fill") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ order) +
  labs(title = "Categorized Marina Responses by Order",
       x = "Proportion",
       y = "Fieldsite")
```

```{r gay v normative}
df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "castro",
         category %in% c("gay","normative")) %>% 
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_normative = mean(category == "normative")
  )

df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "castro") %>% 
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_normative = mean(category == "normative")
  )

df.all %>% 
  filter(response_site == "marina") %>% 
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_normative = mean(category == "normative")
  )
```

```{r community v chaos}
df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro",
         fieldsite == "castro_res") %>%
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_fun = mean(category == "fun"),
    prop_chaos = mean(category == "chaotic"),
    prop_community = mean(category == "community")
  )

df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro",
         fieldsite == "castro_vis") %>%
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_fun = mean(category == "fun"),
    prop_chaos = mean(category == "chaotic"),
    prop_community = mean(category == "community")
  )
```

```{r antitask}
df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro") %>% 
  group_by(fieldsite) %>% 
  summarize(
    prop_antitask = mean(category == "antitask"),
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
  )

df.all %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro",
         fieldsite == "castro_vis") %>%
  summarize(
    prop_gay = mean(category == "gay"),
    prop_fun = mean(category == "fun"),
    prop_chaos = mean(category == "chaotic"),
    prop_community = mean(category == "community")
  )
```
